headline: FOX Sees ‘Focus and Momentum’ as News, Sports and Tubi Gain Ground
summary: John Nallen said FOX (NASDAQ:FOX) is benefiting from a sharper strategic focus than many of its media peers, citing strength in live news, live sports and the company’s ad-supported streaming platform Tubi.
